meta.title: Multiple Consistent Characters That MOVE TOGETHER (OpenArt's Image-to-Video)
meta.description:
Create Multiple Consistent AI Characters that can MOVE!
Try OpenArt 👉  https://openart.ai/home?ref=Dan2
Use code DAN20 for 20% off on OpenArt

In this tutorial I walk you through how to create multiple consistent ai characters in one video that can move together. With OpenArt you can make any consistent character you want. You can then use those characters and put them in an image together, all with just 1 prompt. The best thing is, within OpenArt you can also animate these characters into a video using Kling. In this tutorial I walk you through how to use OpenArt, how to create multiple consistent characters and how to animate them.


👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
